content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Copying Data". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/292/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the copied array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Create a new array and copy the elements from the original array to the new array.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
copied_arr = arr.copy()
print(*copied_arr)
